title: senecio leucanthemifolius subsp. mauritanicus
intro: Senecio leucanthemifolius subsp. mauritanicus, also known as White Daisy Groundsel or Moorland Groundsel, is a flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). This plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Senecio leucanthemifolius subsp. mauritanicus include relief from fever, sore throats, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to act as an antispasmodic and antiarthritic agent. Herbal preparations of this plant typically involve infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which are used to treat various health conditions.
